obligations.rule: Ensure the function validates strings with the default options.
obligations.why: Default options are the baseline behavior and must be tested.
The presence of the currency symbol is enforced by this option.
Negative amounts should be rejected when negatives are disallowed.
Negative amounts should be enclosed in parentheses when this option is enabled.
The currency symbol should appear after the digits when this option is enabled.
Decimal amounts should be rejected when decimals are disallowed.
Decimal amounts should be required when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Validate behavior when `digits_after_decimal` allows multiple values.
obligations.why: The function should accept decimal amounts with varying numbers of digits after the decimal point.
A space should be allowed after the currency symbol when this option is enabled.
A space should be allowed after the digits when this option is enabled.
A placeholder space should be allowed for the negative sign when this option is enabled.

test_groups.title: Default options
test_groups.rationale: Covers the default behavior of the function.

test_groups.title: Require symbol
test_groups.rationale: Tests the enforcement of the currency symbol.

test_groups.title: Disallow negatives
test_groups.rationale: Ensures negative amounts are rejected when disallowed.

test_groups.title: Parens for negatives
test_groups.rationale: Tests the use of parentheses for negative amounts.

test_groups.title: Symbol after digits
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the currency symbol appears after the digits.

test_groups.title: Disallow decimals
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of decimal amounts when disallowed.

test_groups.title: Require decimals
test_groups.rationale: Ensures decimal amounts are required when specified.

test_groups.title: Multiple digits after decimal
test_groups.rationale: Tests support for varying numbers of digits after the decimal.

test_groups.title: Allow space after symbol
test_groups.rationale: Tests allowance of a space after the currency symbol.

test_groups.title: Allow space after digits
test_groups.rationale: Ensures a space is allowed after the digits.

test_groups.title: Allow negative sign placeholder
test_groups.rationale: Tests the use of a placeholder space for the negative sign.
